overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA: San Andreas Definitive Edition showing protagonist CJ walking along a rainy urban street at night. The character moves along a sidewalk beside a multi-lane road with moderate traffic, passing pedestrians and approaching a traffic intersection with large billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk alongside multi-lane arterial road with concrete retaining wall

events.description: character transitions from standing to walking forward along the sidewalk
pedestrian in blue shirt comes into view walking ahead on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk in heavy rain, approaching a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue shirt and black hat walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: steep concrete embankment with horizontal ridges separating the road from higher terrain
tall street lamps illuminating the wet road surface
commercial building facades with closed storefronts along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with CJ walking along a rainy city street at night. The sidewalk runs parallel to a multi-lane road with moderate traffic, bordered by a concrete retaining wall on the far side. Street lamps cast artificial light on the wet pavement as the character approaches a pedestrian walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with large overhead billboard structures

events.description: character overtakes the pedestrian in the blue shirt
approaching and passing under a large overhead billboard gantry spanning the road

agents.ego_description: overtaking the pedestrian and continuing along the sidewalk toward a large billboard structure

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving along the wet road with headlights on

entered.detail: large overhead metal truss structure supporting billboards spanning across the road
large red and white advertisement billboard on the building wall

segments.scene_description: The character overtakes the pedestrian in blue and continues along the commercial street. A large billboard gantry looms ahead spanning the roadway, while the 'Homies Sharp' advertisement becomes prominent on the right wall. The concrete retaining wall recedes as the environment opens up slightly.

scene_state.functional_zone: major intersection with traffic signals and commercial storefronts

events.description: traffic light changes from red to green allowing vehicles to proceed
approaching the crosswalk at the traffic intersection

agents.ego_description: walking under the billboard gantry and approaching a traffic intersection with signal lights

notable_agents.action: white bus stopped at the red light before proceeding on green

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal structure with red and green lights visible
palm trees visible across the intersection in the distance
storefronts with large glass windows and signage

segments.scene_description: The character passes under the billboard gantry and approaches a major intersection. Traffic lights hang overhead, changing from red to green as vehicles including a white bus wait and then proceed. Palm trees are visible across the intersection, and commercial storefronts line the right side of the sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rainy urban sidewalk that transitions from a confined street corridor into a wide, bustling city intersection. It begins with CJ walking past street lamps that cast artificial light on the wet pavement, moving parallel to a multi-lane road bordered by a concrete retaining wall. As the character overtakes a pedestrian in blue, the environment opens up and the camera approaches a large billboard gantry spanning the roadway, passing a prominent Homies Sharp advertisement on the right. The scene then shifts as the character moves under the gantry and toward a major intersection where traffic lights change from red to green. Finally, the view expands to reveal a white bus and other vehicles proceeding forward, with palm trees and commercial storefronts lining the perimeter of the crossing.
